easy_wins: No need to manage security groups - Railway handles networking
No need for key pairs - Railway handles deployment security
limitations: No direct VPC equivalent (Railway provides private networking)
Custom DNS rules need to be handled differently
No SSH access (use Railway CLI for debugging)
manual_steps: Create Dockerfile for the application if not exists
Configure volume mount via Railway JSON patch
Update application code to use Railway environment variables
Set up health check endpoint if not exists

lambda_analysis.reason: This is an EC2 migration, requires full VM/container capabilities
